headline: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Stock Could Be 23% Below Fair Value After Europe Digital Bank Push
summary: Interest in JPMorgan Chase (JPM) stock has picked up after management outlined plans to expand the Chase digital bank into at least five European markets, including France, Spain and Italy, over five years. See our latest analysis for JPMorgan Chase. The Chase digital expansion headlines arrive during a period of firm momentum for JPMorgan Chase, with a 7-day share price return of 7.87% and a 30-day share price return of 10.88%, while the 1-year total shareholder return of 24.09% and 5-year...
